site.title: Small Space Living
site.description: Smart products and hacks for making the most of your small space
site.author: Small Space Living Team

budget_home_office.description: Affordable home office gear for small spaces

space_saving_kitchen.description: Kitchen gadgets and appliances for tiny kitchens
categories: compact air fryers for small kitchens
mini slow cookers and rice cookers
magnetic knife racks for small kitchens
small dish drainers for small kitchens

apartment_organization.description: Storage and organization solutions for apartments

article_formats.prompt_template: Write a detailed, SEO-optimized article titled 'The Best {category} in {year}'. Include an introduction explaining why choosing the right {category} matters for small space living. Then list at least 8 specific products with: product name, key features, approximate price in UK pounds (£), pros and cons, and who it's best for. End with a buying guide section and FAQ. Use natural affiliate-friendly language. Write at least 1000 words. Target length: 1000-1500 words. Year: {year}.

Write a detailed, SEO-optimized article titled 'Top 10 Affordable {category} in {year}'. Include an introduction about choosing {category} for small spaces on a budget. List 10 specific products with: product name, key features, price in UK pounds (£), pros and cons, and ideal user. End with a comparison table overview and FAQ. Use affiliate-friendly language. Write at least 1000 words. Target length: 1000-1500 words. Year: {year}.

Write a detailed, SEO-optimized buying guide article titled 'How to Choose the Best {category} for Your Small Space in {year}'. Cover: what to look for (size, features, price range in UK pounds), top 5 options compared, common mistakes to avoid, and a simple decision framework. Include 5-7 specific product recommendations with key specs. Write at least 1000 words. Target length: 1000-1500 words. Year: {year}.
